summary: Senior technical consultant with 4+ years of SaaS implementation experience focused on enterprise CDP rollouts, marketing-technology integrations, and complex stakeholder management. Strongest at turning messy customer environments into workable technical plans across data architecture, email and SMS infrastructure, APIs, webhooks, and platform operations.

bullets: - Managed an $8.2M+ ARR enterprise portfolio as the first technical point of contact, with $3M+ ARR successfully onboarded to date.
- Led end-to-end implementation lifecycles across project planning, stakeholder coordination, timeline management, and value-realization milestones.
- Designed data architecture for complex enterprise use cases spanning web, app, offline interactions, CRM integration, and catalog management.
- Implemented multi-source integrations across websites, APIs, EDWs, Shopify, Magento, webhooks, S3, Azure, BigQuery, Databricks, and Snowflake.
- Owned email and SMS infrastructure work including ESP integration, DNS setup, deliverability optimization, TCPA compliance, and 10DLC registration.
- Built customer-facing technical resources including Blueshift's Postman collection, internal operational scripts, and implementation process improvements.
- Led enterprise implementations across Oracle, Salesforce, Google, Iterable, and Braze marketing platforms.
- Managed international project teams across time zones while coordinating technical and creative resources.
- Maintained a 100% on-time delivery rate across enterprise and mid-market client work.
- Coordinated integrations between marketing platforms, CRM systems, and e-commerce infrastructure.
- Generated 40+ product requirements that were implemented and used in production.
- Secured acceptance to the Plug & Play Travel Batch Accelerator through product positioning and technical communication.
- Built networking and partnership programs that supported business development and market access.
